title: acaena dolichanthera
intro: Acaena dolichanthera is a plant species commonly found in New Zealand, belonging to the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Acaena dolichanthera include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues, as well as its potential in lowering blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Acaena dolichanthera are typically made from its leaves and roots, often used in teas or tinctures.
